description: A supervisor needs to manually sequence the jobs queued at a specific workstation for the day to minimize setup time.

nodes.task_description: List all work orders scheduled for the 'Painting' workstation for today.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a list of 5 jobs with different color requirements.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the setup time required for color changes between jobs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the optimal sequence to minimize color changes (e.g., light to dark colors).

nodes.task_description: Reorder the job sequence in the system and publish the new queue for the operator.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the job order in the MES queue.
